requirement_topic.en: IMANOR NM / IEC 61851 EV Charging System Safety
requirement_topic.zh: IMANOR NM / IEC 61851 电动汽车充电系统安全
requirement_topic.zht: IMANOR NM / IEC 61851 電動汽車充電系統安全

summary.en: IEC 61851-1 (general requirements for electric vehicle conductive charging systems) and IEC 61851-23 (DC EV charging stations) define the safety and functional requirements for EV charging equipment. IMANOR NM adoption of IEC 61851 means project owners, public charging concessionaires, and ONEE-regulated charging infrastructure programmes expect test evidence against IEC 61851 from an accredited laboratory. IEC 61851-1 covers Mode 1, 2, 3, and 4 charging, including the control pilot signalling, protective earth requirements, and leakage current limits applicable to AC and DC chargers in the Moroccan market.
summary.zh: IEC 61851-1（电动汽车传导充电系统通用要求）和IEC 61851-23（直流EV充电站）规定了EV充电设备的安全和功能要求。IMANOR NM采标IEC 61851意味着项目业主、公共充电特许经营商及ONEE监管的充电基础设施计划期望提供认可实验室出具的IEC 61851测试证据。IEC 61851-1涵盖Mode 1、2、3和4充电，包括适用于摩洛哥市场交直流充电设备的控制导引信号、保护接地要求和漏电流限值。
summary.zht: IEC 61851-1（電動汽車傳導充電系統通用要求）和IEC 61851-23（直流EV充電站）規定了EV充電設備的安全和功能要求。IMANOR NM採標IEC 61851意味著項目業主、公共充電特許經營商及ONEE監管的充電基礎設施計畫期望提供認可實驗室出具的IEC 61851測試證據。IEC 61851-1涵蓋Mode 1、2、3和4充電，包括適用於摩洛哥市場交直流充電設備的控制導引信號、保護接地要求和漏電流限值。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 (electric vehicle conductive charging systems — general requirements) as adopted by IMANOR
IEC 61851-23:2014+AMD1:2023 (DC EV charging stations) as adopted by IMANOR
IEC 61851-21-2 (EMC requirements for off-board EV supply equipment)
Moroccan ministerial arrêtés on regulated electrical equipment

summary.en: Chinese EV charger safety follows GB/T 18487.1 (conductive charging system for electric vehicles — general requirements), which is technically derived from IEC 61851-1 but has diverged in specific requirements, test sequences, and marking. Chinese GB/T 18487.1 test reports are not directly equivalent to IEC 61851-1 test reports for the Morocco market. An IEC 61851-route test on the IEC-connector hardware variant is required.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备安全以GB/T 18487.1（电动汽车传导充电系统通用要求）为依据，该标准在技术上源自IEC 61851-1，但在具体要求、测试顺序和标志方面存在差异。中国GB/T 18487.1测试报告不等同于摩洛哥市场所需的IEC 61851-1测试报告。需要对IEC插座硬件型号进行IEC 61851路径测试。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備安全以GB/T 18487.1（電動汽車傳導充電系統通用要求）為依據，該標準在技術上源自IEC 61851-1，但在具體要求、測試順序和標誌方面存在差異。中國GB/T 18487.1測試報告不等同於摩洛哥市場所需的IEC 61851-1測試報告。需要對IEC插座硬體型號進行IEC 61851路徑測試。

gap.en: Obtain IEC 61851-1 (and IEC 61851-23 for DC chargers) test reports from an accredited laboratory for the Morocco-spec hardware variant with IEC 62196 connectors. Chinese GB/T 18487.1 test data may support a technical gap analysis but does not replace IEC-route evidence. Confirm with IMANOR or the project owner whether a conformity certificate or declaration of conformity to IEC 61851 is required for customs clearance or the public-charging procurement programme.
gap.zh: 应委托认可实验室为配备IEC 62196插座的摩洛哥规格硬件型号出具IEC 61851-1（直流充电设备还需IEC 61851-23）测试报告。中国GB/T 18487.1测试数据可支持技术差距分析，但不能替代IEC路径证据。应与IMANOR或项目业主确认海关清关或公共充电采购计划是否要求提供IEC 61851合格证书或符合性声明。
gap.zht: 應委託認可實驗室為配備IEC 62196插座的摩洛哥規格硬體型號出具IEC 61851-1（直流充電設備還需IEC 61851-23）測試報告。中國GB/T 18487.1測試數據可支持技術差距分析，但不能替代IEC路徑證據。應與IMANOR或項目業主確認海關清關或公共充電採購計畫是否要求提供IEC 61851合格證書或符合性聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where a ministerial arrêté or public-procurement specification requires IEC 61851 conformity; IEC 61851 is the expected technical route in Morocco for EV charging infrastructure
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese domestic market under GB/T 18487; GB/T test reports are not directly accepted for Morocco

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 18487.1 test evidence does not satisfy the IEC 61851 / IMANOR NM route expected for Morocco. Obtain IEC 61851-1 (and IEC 61851-23 for DC) test evidence on the Morocco IEC-connector hardware variant before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 18487.1测试证据不满足摩洛哥预期的IEC 61851/IMANOR NM路径。出货前应在摩洛哥IEC插座硬件型号上获取IEC 61851-1（直流充电设备还需IEC 61851-23）测试证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 18487.1測試證據不滿足摩洛哥預期的IEC 61851/IMANOR NM路徑。出貨前應在摩洛哥IEC插座硬體型號上獲取IEC 61851-1（直流充電設備還需IEC 61851-23）測試證據。

requirement_topic.en: EMC and Electrical Safety for EV Chargers in Morocco
requirement_topic.zh: 摩洛哥电动汽车充电设备的电磁兼容与电气安全
requirement_topic.zht: 摩洛哥電動汽車充電設備的電磁兼容與電氣安全

summary.en: IEC 61851-21-2 covers EMC requirements for off-board EV supply equipment (chargers). IMANOR NM framework adopts IEC CISPR standards for electromagnetic emissions and IEC 61000 series for immunity. Low-voltage electrical safety for equipment placed on the Moroccan market is governed by Arrêté No. 2573-14 (low-voltage equipment safety requirements under the CMIM mark programme). Fixed electrical installation rules for EV charging points follow NM 06.1.100 (the Moroccan adoption of IEC 60364 installation rules). Public charging stations connected to the Moroccan LV grid must comply with residual current device (RCD) requirements and protective earth isolation per IEC 61851-1 Mode 3 requirements. Outdoor and public-access enclosures must meet IEC 60529 IP ratings appropriate for the Moroccan climate (dust and heat).
summary.zh: IEC 61851-21-2涵盖车外EV供电设备（充电设备）的电磁兼容要求。IMANOR NM框架采标IEC CISPR标准用于电磁发射，IEC 61000系列用于抗扰度。在摩洛哥市场投放的设备低压电气安全由第2573-14号令（CMIM标志计划下的低压设备安全要求）规管。EV充电点固定电气安装规则遵循NM 06.1.100（IEC 60364安装规则的摩洛哥采标版本）。接入摩洛哥低压电网的公共充电站须符合剩余电流装置（RCD）要求及IEC 61851-1 Mode 3的保护接地隔离要求。室外和公共场所机柜须满足适合摩洛哥气候（沙尘和高温）的IEC 60529 IP防护等级。
summary.zht: IEC 61851-21-2涵蓋車外EV供電設備（充電設備）的電磁兼容要求。IMANOR NM框架採標IEC CISPR標準用於電磁發射，IEC 61000系列用於抗擾度。在摩洛哥市場投放的設備低壓電氣安全由第2573-14號令（CMIM標誌計畫下的低壓設備安全要求）規管。EV充電點固定電氣安裝規則遵循NM 06.1.100（IEC 60364安裝規則的摩洛哥採標版本）。接入摩洛哥低壓電網的公共充電站須符合剩餘電流裝置（RCD）要求及IEC 61851-1 Mode 3的保護接地隔離要求。室外和公共場所機櫃須滿足適合摩洛哥氣候（沙塵和高溫）的IEC 60529 IP防護等級。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-21-2 (EMC requirements for off-board EV supply equipment)
IEC CISPR 11 / CISPR 32 as adopted by IMANOR NM
IEC 61000-4 series (immunity) as adopted by IMANOR NM
Arrêté No. 2573-14 (low-voltage electrical equipment safety — CMIM mark requirement)
NM 06.1.100 (Moroccan adoption of IEC 60364 electrical installation rules — applies to fixed EV charging point installations)

summary.en: Chinese EV charger EMC testing follows GB/T 18487.2 (EMC requirements for EV conductive charging systems), which aligns with IEC 61851-21-2 but may differ in specific test configurations and limits. Chinese outdoor enclosures are tested for IP rating under GB/T 4208. Chinese test reports are useful technical references but require IEC-route supplementation for the Morocco market.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备电磁兼容测试以GB/T 18487.2（电动汽车传导充电系统电磁兼容性要求）为依据，该标准与IEC 61851-21-2对应，但在具体测试配置和限值上可能存在差异。中国室外机柜按GB/T 4208测试IP防护等级。中国测试报告具有技术参考价值，但需为摩洛哥市场补充IEC路径证据。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備電磁兼容測試以GB/T 18487.2（電動汽車傳導充電系統電磁兼容性要求）為依據，該標準與IEC 61851-21-2對應，但在具體測試配置和限值上可能存在差異。中國室外機櫃按GB/T 4208測試IP防護等級。中國測試報告具有技術參考價值，但需為摩洛哥市場補充IEC路徑證據。

gap.en: Confirm that the Morocco-export EV charger model carries IEC 61851-21-2 EMC test evidence and an appropriate IP rating (minimum IP54 for outdoor use in Moroccan conditions). RCD type selection should be confirmed against ONEE LV grid requirements. If project-finance or EU-funded programme applies, CE marking under the EU EMC Directive and Low Voltage Directive may be specifically required.
gap.zh: 确认摩洛哥出口EV充电设备型号持有IEC 61851-21-2电磁兼容测试证据，以及适当的IP防护等级（摩洛哥室外使用至少IP54）。RCD类型选择应与ONEE低压电网要求核对确认。若涉及项目融资或欧盟资助计划，可能专门要求欧盟电磁兼容指令和低电压指令下的CE标志。
gap.zht: 確認摩洛哥出口EV充電設備型號持有IEC 61851-21-2電磁兼容測試證據，以及適當的IP防護等級（摩洛哥室外使用至少IP54）。RCD類型選擇應與ONEE低壓電網要求核對確認。若涉及項目融資或歐盟資助計畫，可能專門要求歐盟電磁兼容指令和低電壓指令下的CE標誌。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for public-access chargers connected to the Moroccan LV grid; IP rating is a safety and durability requirement for outdoor installations in Morocco's climate
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under Chinese market requirements (GB/T 18487.2, GB/T 4208); Chinese test evidence is not directly accepted for Morocco

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ensure the Morocco-export EV charger variant carries IEC 61851-21-2 EMC evidence and an appropriate IP rating. Chinese GB/T 18487.2 test data requires IEC-route supplementation for the Moroccan market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 确保摩洛哥出口EV充电设备型号持有IEC 61851-21-2电磁兼容证据和适当的IP防护等级。中国GB/T 18487.2测试数据需要为摩洛哥市场补充IEC路径证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 確保摩洛哥出口EV充電設備型號持有IEC 61851-21-2電磁兼容證據和適當的IP防護等級。中國GB/T 18487.2測試數據需要為摩洛哥市場補充IEC路徑證據。
